nasb.text: He made ten basins of bronze, one basin held forty baths; each basin was four cubits, and on each of the ten stands was one basin.

esv.text: And he made ten basins of bronze. Each basin held forty baths, each basin measured four cubits, and there was a basin for each of the ten stands.

cnv.text: 他又做了十個銅盆，每個銅盆能盛水八百公升；每個銅盆的直徑都是一公尺八公寸。在十個盆座上，每個都安放一個銅盆。

ccb.text: 他又用铜制造了十个盆，盆径一点八米，容量八百八十升。十个铜盆分别放在十个盆座上。
